violations.text: No person in charge with serv safe/food safety at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
Some beverage bottles were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

The establishment does not employee a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. PIC is to register with RIDOH as soon as possible. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Observed mini display signs in the hand-washing sink located next to self-service hot holding. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed mini display signs from sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

The front door to the outside is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Chemicals were observed stored above chips. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of food by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
